notes: Structural gate, graded by skill-creator's grader. hf-validate runs lint (strict 0-error gate) + headless-seek snapshot and writes 05-validation.md. It must PASS a clean composition (frames captured) and BLOCK a composition with lint errors. Assumes a composition/ authored by hf-build. Derived from 1-requirements.md JTBD-1..4 (the 0-errors-before-render gate) and the non-functional 'composition lints with 0 errors before render'.

evals.name: clean-composition-passes-with-frames
evals.prompt: Validate the composition for the api-rate-limit-teaser project, snapshotting one frame per scene.
expectations: runs hyperframes lint and records errorCount 0 in artifacts/api-rate-limit-teaser/05-validation.md
captures one key-frame PNG per requested timestamp into artifacts/api-rate-limit-teaser/snapshots/ (plus contact-sheet.jpg)
05-validation.md ends with a PASS verdict naming the error/warning counts and the captured-frame paths
[media-judge] the captured frames are real and legible (not blank/black) — the headline and key facts are visible, text is inside the safe zone, and the concept palette/fonts are applied

evals.name: lint-errors-block-the-render
evals.prompt: Validate the broken-overlap project whose composition has two clips overlapping on the same track.
expectations: hyperframes lint reports at least one error (e.g. overlapping_clips_same_track); the strict gate fails
05-validation.md ends with a BLOCKED verdict that names the error code(s) and does NOT claim the project is render-ready
no full render is attempted; the verdict routes the fix back to hf-build
the script exits non-zero on the blocked composition
